expectations.text: Invoice number (#2026-014) and amount ($4,500) are included
Due date (February 15) and days overdue (18) are mentioned
expectations.evidence: 'due on February 15, 2026. The payment is now 18 days overdue'

expectations.text: Tone is firmer than a first reminder but still professional
expectations.evidence: Tone is flat and impersonal rather than firm. Says 'at your earliest convenience' which is actually softer than a typical first reminder, not firmer.

expectations.text: Includes a clear call-to-action (pay by specific date or contact to discuss)
expectations.evidence: No specific payment deadline given. 'at your earliest convenience' is vague, not a clear call-to-action with a date.

expectations.text: References that this is the second reminder
